taskVersion.name: find_reversed_word_single

parts.text:
Below is a jumbled sequence of 50 random alphanumeric strings. Within this data, there is one English word spelled backwards.

Data Block: [nVizK, V0BkiHQU, CPURtEy, MyiwEO, 9DIFqoYm, ZQkTRh, mp7qVWM, 4dYXz5P, 1qJib, NmeLlfc, 8byD9, f3gMw84, hhZX5S1, Sgdxzl, KRec5EO, s8G9R, tnCulvRB, 1Ei6SJ, KUzsH, q1YBxR, 9jI9g, j1uYHTA, x7IKoL, ApvhH8q, gRUTkG, iTohho, cPr4G9, 5VdZaP, GmHbF, GzfzO, QirttLg, Q5Bdt7, 6rhEJSM, jTPbzNSd, YoQ5Gn9, EPe3xVg, yyAfKn, gcN10, JhlbTI, SmcNH, OTRHB9, 93qK3huJ, BZEyIxqt, zqn5c7x, KRAMHCNEB, o61Czbv, MndG5, qGwfj95c, LrVq4i, lrKA48]

Task: Find the English word hidden in the sequence, reverse it to its original spelling, and output only that word.
